calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2021 Set For Trial On Aug-18-21 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 502

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2021 Continued To Aug-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances; Hector Ordonez, Plaintiff/Respondent - assisted by Spanish Interpreter Monica Hernandez, No. 301545; Sergio Alvarrenga, Defendant/Appellant (Spanish interpreter waived).

All parties are placed under oath.
Mr. Alvarrenga requests a continuance to retain a lawyer as his employer should be responsible for the damages from the accident. Mr. Ordonez opposes the request.

After review and discussion, the Court passes the matter to allow Mr. Alvarrenga to contact legal services for a date certain next week when the attorney can appear.

Back in session.

After testimony and discussion, the Court denies Mr. Alvarrenga's request for a continuance.
Mr. Ordonez submits the following exhibits:
A: Estimate of repairs
B: Photo of damage to car

The Court takes the matter under submission.

Exhibits were returned to Plaintiff/Respondent after hearing.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-21-2021 Judgment Entered
